final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original interior design render of a Neo-Chinese style tea room for quiet contemplation and tea ceremony.

Style/medium: interior design visualization, Neo-Chinese aesthetic, photorealistic 3D render with subtle film grain
Composition: eye-level medium shot from tea drinker's perspective, 35mm lens, balanced symmetrical layout
Subject: solid wood tea table with natural grain texture, Yixing purple clay teapot and matching tea cups arranged in traditional gongfu tea setup
Scene/backdrop: calligraphy scroll mounted on wall, bonsai tree in ceramic pot, large window revealing swaying bamboo shadows outside
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight filtering through bamboo, warm interior accent lighting, serene and meditative atmosphere
Color palette: warm wood tones as base, earthy brown clay accents, muted ink black from calligraphy, fresh green from bamboo and bonsai
Materials/textures: natural wood grain, porous unglazed clay teaware, rice paper scroll texture, ceramic glaze on bonsai pot, bamboo leaf translucency
Avoid: over-saturated colors, modern plastic materials, cluttered composition, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer terms
